_metadata.source: Initial parameters derived from ChatGPT ODE design (■Pythonシミュレーション_MBT55_Hypercycle_Engine_.md)
_metadata.status: epsilon_tuned_for_H2_constraint — pending full evidence fit via scipy.optimize
_metadata.ipcc_ref: IPCC Tier 2, Chapter 11 (N2O from managed soils), Chapter 10 (enteric fermentation)
_metadata.epsilon_tuning_method: Parametric scan: epsilon=3.0 yields max|dH2/dt|=0.019 < threshold 0.05. Uses constant methanotroph/sulfur-bacteria background pool (not Xf-dependent). Physics evidence: DeepSeek M1 — H2 at detection limit in MBT55 soil.
